title: AI Bubble Pops, Zuck Freezes Hiring, Newsom's 2028 Surge, Russia/Ukraine Endgame
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros

(1:59) What's new with the All-In Summit

(9:02) AI Mania hits the brakes: sign of a bubble or a healthy correction?

(30:49) Meta's AI hiring freeze: are the AI talent wars slowing down?

(39:09) Gavin Newsom is the early favorite to be the 2028 Democratic nominee

(54:03) Russia/Ukraine: Trump's two summits, what endgame to expect?

analysis.summary: The episode discusses the AI bubble, Meta's AI hiring freeze, Gavin Newsom's potential 2028 presidential run, and the Russia-Ukraine conflict. The hosts analyze the current state of AI and its potential impact on the market. They also discuss the latest developments in the Russia-Ukraine conflict and the potential endgame.

takeaways.text: AI market may be in a bubble
Gavin Newsom is the early favorite for the 2028 Democratic nomination
Russia-Ukraine conflict may be nearing its endgame
AI talent wars may be slowing down
95% of generative AI pilots at companies are failing
Sam Altman warns of an AI market bubble

quotes.text: AI market is in a bubble
quotes.speaker: Unknown

sentiment.notes: The hosts are cautious about the AI market and its potential impact on the economy. They also discuss the uncertainty surrounding the Russia-Ukraine conflict.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of the AI bubble begins
Meta's AI hiring freeze is discussed
Gavin Newsom's potential 2028 presidential run is discussed
Russia-Ukraine conflict and potential endgame are discussed
